expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py inspect <file>' to get model structure
expectations.evidence: Report generated 'by direct openpyxl inspection (v3.1.5)'. No idfa_ops.py inspect command was used.

expectations.text: The inspect output lists all 20 named ranges (6 Inp_ + 14 calculations)
expectations.evidence: 'Total defined names: 20'. All 20 listed in Named Ranges table with their references, formulas, and values.

expectations.text: Identifies which named ranges are on the Assumptions sheet vs Calculations sheet
expectations.evidence: Section 5 'Named Range Cross-Reference by Sheet': Assumptions (6 named ranges) and Calculations (14 named ranges) listed separately.

expectations.text: Distinguishes raw values (inputs) from formula cells (calculations)
expectations.evidence: Table shows Value Type column: 'Raw (int)', 'Raw (float)' for inputs; 'Formula' for calculations. Each formula cell shows its formula text.

expectations.text: Reports whether intent notes (comments) are present on formula cells
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'All Comments (Consolidated)' lists all 14 comments on Calculations sheet cells. Section 3 Calculations sheet header: 'Comments: 14'. Assumptions: 'Comments: 0'.

expectations.text: Presents the information in an organized, human-readable format — not raw JSON dump
expectations.evidence: Report has 8 organized sections with tables: Sheet Inventory, Named Ranges, Per-Sheet Cell Detail, Comments, Cross-Reference, Formula Dependencies. Well-structured markdown.
